SHINE_POWER.title: Shine
SHINE_POWER.description: Effective on cards with Shine. Increase by a value equal to Shine.
TURN_SHINE_POWER.title: Round To Shine
TURN_SHINE_POWER.description: The Shine that takes effect this round will be removed at the end of the round.
TEMP_SHINE_POWER.title: Temporary Shine
TEMP_SHINE_POWER.description: Remove after playing a card with Shine.
REVENGE_POWER.title: Revenge
REVENGE_POWER.description: Effective on cards with Shine. Multiply the card value according to Revenge; when playing a shining card, you will lose life equal to Revenge.
TURN_REVENGE_POWER.title: Round Of Revenge
TURN_REVENGE_POWER.description: Revenge that takes effect this round will be removed at the end of the round.
TEMP_REVENGE_POWER.title: Temporary Revenge
TEMP_REVENGE_POWER.description: Remove after playing a card with Shine.
REVENGE_REFUND_POWER.title: Revenge Return
SHINE_REFUND_POWER.title: Shining Return
GAIN_TEMP_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Temporarily Shine Next Turn
GAIN_TEMP_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descript: Gain [gold] temporary Shine[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
GAIN_TEMP_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarterD: Gain {Amount} points[gold]temporary Shine[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
GAIN_TURN_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Shine Next Round
GAIN_TURN_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descript: Gain [gold] turn Shine[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
GAIN_TURN_SHINE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarterD: At the beginning of the next turn, gain {Amount} points[gold] and Shine [/gold].
GAIN_TEMP_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Temporary Revenge Next Turn
GAIN_TEMP_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descri: Gain [gold]temporary Revenge[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
GAIN_TEMP_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarte: Gain {Amount} points[gold]temporary Revenge[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
GAIN_TURN_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Revenge Next Round
GAIN_TURN_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.descri: Get [gold]Revenge[/gold] at the beginning of the next turn.
GAIN_TURN_REVENGE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarte: At the beginning of the next round, gain {Amount} points[gold]Revenge of the turn[/gold].
VENGEANCE_BELL_POWER.title: Revenge Bell (Echo)
VENGEANCE_BELL_POWER.description: At the beginning of the next round, all enemies lose 10 life points.
ACT_CUTE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Be Cute (prepared)
ACT_CUTE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.description: At the beginning of the next round, it will be incorporeal and unable to play cards, and its life will be restored at the end of the round.
ACT_CUTE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smarterDescript: At the beginning of the next round, it will be incorporeal and unable to play cards. At the end of the round, {Amount} points of life will be restored.
ACT_CUTE_LOCKOUT_POWER.title: Acting Cute
ACT_CUTE_LOCKOUT_POWER.description: Unable to play cards. Life is restored at the end of the turn.
ACT_CUTE_LOCKOUT_POWER.smarterDescriptio: Unable to play cards. At the end of the round, restore {Amount} points of life.
MIRROR_STAGE_POWER.title: Mirror Stage
MIRROR_STAGE_POWER.description: Reflect all blocked damage this round.
MOTHERS_LIE_POWER.title: Mother's Lies
MOTHERS_LIE_POWER.description: Every time you lose life this round, all enemies will lose life.
MOTHERS_LIE_POWER.smarterDescription: Each time you lose life this round, all enemies will lose {Amount} points of life.
NEXT_SHINE_DISCOUNT_POWER.title: Rhythm Adjustment
PASSION_POWER.title: Passion
PASSION_POWER.description: At turn end, gain 1 stack. Die immediately when it reaches 10 stacks.
CHASING_LIGHT_POWER.title: Chasing The Light
CHASING_LIGHT_POWER.description: Every time a certain amount of [gold] is used to Shine [/gold], 1 point of energy is obtained.
CHASING_LIGHT_POWER.smarterDescription: For every {Amount} point [gold] Shines [/gold] used, 1 energy point is obtained.
FLEEING_LIGHT_POWER.title: Fleeing From Light
FLEEING_LIGHT_POWER.description: Every time a certain amount of [gold]Revenge[/gold] is used, 1 card is drawn.
FLEEING_LIGHT_POWER.smarterDescription: For every {Amount} point[gold]Revenge[/gold] used, draw 1 card.
LAST_MINUTE_STUDY_POWER.title: Final Review
LAST_MINUTE_STUDY_POWER.description: Gain 1 point [gold] temporary Shine[/gold] when playing a skill card.
STAY_INDOORS_POWER.title: Stay Behind Closed Doors
STAY_INDOORS_POWER.description: At the end of the round, if you lost life this round, you will gain 2 [gold] Temporary Revenge [/gold] and 5 [gold] Block [/gold] points in the next round.
NOT_AS_FRAGILE_AS_IMAGINED_POWER.title: Not As Fragile As Imagined
RUMOR_NETWORK_POWER.title: Rumor Network
RUMOR_NETWORK_POWER.description: When giving [gold] Weak[/gold] or [gold] Vulnerable[/gold] for the first time each round, draw a card.
RUMOR_NETWORK_POWER.smarterDescription: When giving [gold] Weak[/gold] or [gold] Vulnerable[/gold] for the first time each round, draw {Amount} cards.
STAGE_ARMOR_POWER.title: Stage Shell
STAGE_ARMOR_POWER.description: For every 1 life point lost, gain [gold]Block[/gold].
STAGE_ARMOR_POWER.smarterDescription: For every life point lost, gain {Amount} points[gold]Block[/gold].
DIE_ALONE_POWER.title: Die Alone
DIE_ALONE_POWER.description: When losing life for the first time in each round, gain 3 points of [gold] to block [/gold].
RUBY_LEGACY_POWER.title: Ruby's Legacy
RUBY_LEGACY_POWER.description: When you get [gold] Shine[/gold], get 3 points of [gold] block[/gold]. When gaining [gold]Revenge[/gold], lose 1 life and gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold].
DUAL_MIRROR_POWER.title: Double-sided Mirror
DUAL_MIRROR_POWER.description: Whenever [gold] Shine[/gold] or [gold]Revenge[/gold] changes, draw 1 card.
SHELL_FORGED_BY_LIES_POWER.title: A Shell Made Of Lies
SHELL_FORGED_BY_LIES_POWER.description: At the end of the round, cause [gold]Revenge[/gold]脳4 damage to all enemies. If you have lost life this round, damage +8.
LIGHT_FROM_PASSION_POWER.title: The Light Of Passion
LIGHT_FROM_PASSION_POWER.description: At the end of the turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Shine[/gold]脳6.
RETREAT_BACKSTAGE_POWER.title: Escape Behind The Scenes
RETREAT_BACKSTAGE_POWER.description: The first time you get [gold]Revenge[/gold] each round, you gain 2 energy points and 10 [gold] block [/gold] points.
TAKE_THE_STAGE_POWER.title: Get On Stage
TAKE_THE_STAGE_POWER.description: When you get [gold] Shine[/gold] for the first time each round, draw 2 cards and gain 6 points of [gold]Block[/gold].
IDOL_RADIANCE_POWER.title: Idol Light
IDOL_RADIANCE_POWER.description: When you play the [gold]Shine[/gold] card for the first time in each round, you will get 2 point of [gold]Temporary Shine[/gold].
REVEAL_TRUTH_POWER.title: Reveal The Truth
REVEAL_TRUTH_POWER.description: At the beginning of the round, if your health is less than half, gain 1 point of [gold]Revenge[/gold].
TRAP_POWER.title: Trap
TRAP_POWER.description: Attack damage taken is increased by 100%. Decreased by 1 layer at the end of each round.
ESCAPE_POWER.title: Get Away
ESCAPE_POWER.description: Attack damage taken is reduced by 50%. Decreased by 1 layer at the end of each round.
RUMOR_POWER.title: Gossip
RUMOR_POWER.description: Each layer increases attack damage received by 10%. Decreased by 1 layer at the end of each round.
PLAN_POWER.title: Plan
PLAN_POWER.description: Used to play specific cards or change card effects.
BLACK_STAR_POWER.title: Dark Stars
BLACK_STAR_POWER.description: Each time you obtain a plan, you gain 1 additional layer.
SINKING_POWER.title: Sink
SINKING_POWER.description: Gain a plan at the beginning of each round.
SINKING_POWER.smarterDescription: Gain {Amount} level of planning at the beginning of each round.
UNREACHABLE_POWER.title: Out Of Reach
UNREACHABLE_POWER.description: For every 7 cards drawn, 1 additional card is drawn.
ENCORE_POWER.title: Encore
ENCORE_POWER.description: Each time you obtain a blood-soaked petal, gain 2 [gold] block [/gold] points.
NIGHTMARE_POWER.title: Nightmare
NIGHTMARE_POWER.description: Whenever a card is consumed, gain 2 points of temporary Revenge.
BEAUTIFUL_DREAM_POWER.title: Sweet Dream
BEAUTIFUL_DREAM_POWER.description: Each time a card is generated during battle, you will gain temporary Shine.
BEAUTIFUL_DREAM_POWER.smarterDescription: Each time a card is generated during battle, you will gain {Amount} points of temporary Shine.
TWO_CHILDS_POWER.title: Two Kids?
TWO_CHILDS_POWER.description: Gain 2 points of temporary Shine and 2 points of temporary Revenge each round.
HANDSCROLL_PAINTING_POWER.title: Picture Scroll
HANDSCROLL_PAINTING_POWER.description: After winning the battle, 1 card can be permanently removed from the deck.
FIRE_EXECUTION_POWER.title: Burning At The Stake
FIRE_EXECUTION_POWER.description: Each time you deal unblocked damage to an enemy, grant 1 stack of Rumor.
METAMORPHOSIS_POWER.title: Metamorphosis
METAMORPHOSIS_POWER.description: No longer affected by weakness, vulnerability, or vulnerability.
THEREBY_SHINING_POWER.title: Thus Shine
THEREBY_SHINING_POWER.description: Each time a void card is played, gain 1 energy point.
EXPECT_POWER.title: Expect
EXPECT_POWER.description: During this round, the expendable cards played will go into the discard pile.
BACK_VIEW_POWER.title: Back View
BACK_VIEW_POWER.description: The next consumed card played is returned to the hand.
FARAWAY_POWER.title: Keep Away
FARAWAY_POWER.description: At the beginning of the next turn, damage is dealt to all enemies.
FARAWAY_POWER.smarterDescription: At the beginning of the next turn, deal {Amount} points of damage to all enemies.
DESOLATE_BATTLEFIELD_POWER.title: The Battlefield Is Deserted
DESOLATE_BATTLEFIELD_POWER.description: Power is temporarily lost this round and returned at the end of the round.
UNDER_THE_SEA_POWER.title: Fall Into The Sea
UNDER_THE_SEA_POWER.description: Die at the beginning of the next turn.
ENCORE_POWER.smarterDescription: Each time you obtain a blood-soaked petal, gain {Amount} points in block.
TROUBLE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Trouble
TROUBLE_NEXT_TURN_POWER.description: Get blood-soaked petals starting next round
HOSHINO_AI_MECHANICS_POWER.title: Idol Challenge
HOSHINO_AI_MECHANICS_POWER.description: Phase boss: complete current phase goals to advance. When all goals reach 0, phase changes.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_DRAW_GOAL_POWER.title: Phase 1 Draw Goal
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_DRAW_GOAL_POWER.descri: Total cards players still need to draw in Phase 1.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_DRAW_GOAL_POWER.smarte: Players still need to draw {Amount} cards in Phase 1.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_PLAY_GOAL_POWER.title: Phase 1 Play Goal
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_PLAY_GOAL_POWER.descri: Total cards players still need to play in Phase 1.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE1_PLAY_GOAL_POWER.smarte: Players still need to play {Amount} cards in Phase 1.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE2_BLOCK_GOAL_POWER.title: Phase 2 Block Goal
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE2_BLOCK_GOAL_POWER.descr: Total Block players still need to gain in Phase 2.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE2_BLOCK_GOAL_POWER.smart: Players still need to gain {Amount} Block in Phase 2.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE2_ENERGY_GOAL_POWER.desc: Total Energy players still need to spend in Phase 2.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE2_ENERGY_GOAL_POWER.smar: Players still need to spend {Amount} Energy in Phase 2.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE3_REBIRTH_GOAL_POWER.des: Players who still need to play Rebirth in Phase 3.
HOSHINO_AI_PHASE3_REBIRTH_GOAL_POWER.sma: {Amount} players still need to play Rebirth in Phase 3.
HOSHINO_AI_SCRUTINY_POWER.title: Draw Restriction
HOSHINO_AI_SCRUTINY_POWER.description: You cannot draw extra cards this turn.
